english_text:
Heart, Intellect
SUBMISSION (arrow downward)
I won't submit
alt_text: Pedagogical scene of the 'commanding-evil soul': a Quran with a prohibition (no-entry) sign at top; below, a box with Heart (قلب) and Intellect (عقل) connected by a curved arrow; a black human head says 'I won't submit'. A red 'SUBMISSION' arrow points downward.
notes: Diagrammatic portrait of nafs al-Ammara — refuses submission to Quran's guidance.
